name: s2-sssu-origin-alignment-brain
description: S2 Spatial Twin & Origin Alignment Brain. Python-based physics runtime for 2D spatial translation and 14D generative tensor simulation.

network.justification: Localhost for internal IPC. The 192.168.50.0/24 subnet is strictly reserved as the dedicated S2 Swarm IoT VLAN for local P2P synchronization. Broad /8 and /16 access has been explicitly revoked to enforce the principle of least privilege and minimize the blast radius.
